properties.displayName: Deny Creating a Microsoft Fabric Capacity
properties.description: This policy prevents users from creating a Microsoft Fabric Capacity resource.

nonComplianceMessages.message: Provisioning a Fabric Capacity is restricted to authorized subscriptions in the Landing Zone. Please see Tech Docs for more information on how to request a new Fabric capacity: https://developer.gov.bc.ca/docs/default/component/public-cloud-techdocs/azure/azure-services/external-fabric/
